name: Movable Feast Decadence
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F.
Melt chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler.
Beat the eggs and sugar until they triple in volume. Beat in the flour. Add the melted chocolate to the eggs.
Continue to beat. Pour into a butter and floured 9-inch pan.
Bake for 15-20 minutes. The cake is done when it is still soft in the center. Cool for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
Decorate with whipped cream. (I've also decorated with powdered sugar or a chocolate glaze, just depends on who I'm making the cake for.)
